LAW-1.detail: All enterprise components conform to protocols

LAW-2.detail: Interface authority for ITenantRouter, IUsageMeter, IBillingEngine, IComplianceAuditor

LAW-9.detail: Governance is policy-driven — tenant isolation, billing policy, compliance governance

LAW-11.detail: All enterprise state is instance-scoped — no globals

LAW-23.detail: Tenant isolation boundary — STRICT blocks cross-access

LAW-24.detail: cost_units use Decimal precision; pricing tiers per op_type

LAW-25.detail: PaymentState transitions deterministic, rollback restores snapshot

LAW-27.detail: Every audit entry uniquely identified via SHA-256 chain

RULE-2.detail: Input validated on tenant_route, meter_record, invoice_generate

RULE-3.detail: G-L1 through G-L5 and G-A1 guards enforced on every transition

RULE-5.detail: Rollback restores exact billing state; suspend is idempotent
